exact_spec: 850 mm frame-only kit with carbon landing gear
notes: Buy frame-only. Confirm 850 mm motor-center geometry, plate thickness, motor-hole pattern and delivered mass.

exact_spec: 340KV; 6S; recommended 15x5.5; 188 g
notes: Six installed plus one spare. Purchase one first for thrust-stand acceptance testing.

notes: Four dual packs provide six installed ESCs and two spares. These are PWM ESCs; do not configure DShot.

exact_spec: 15x5.5 inch; one CW and one CCW
notes: Three installed pairs plus one spare pair. Balance every prop and verify hub fit and adjacent-tip clearance.

exact_spec: Plastic case; STM32H743; triple IMU; no bundled power module
notes: Use current ArduPilot stable firmware. Mount on vibration isolation and keep a hardware safety switch.

exact_spec: IST8310 compass; standard 10-pin Pixhawk connector
notes: Mount above the power system; verify compass consistency and GPS HDOP before arming.

exact_spec: Select only the locally legal 433 or 915 MHz version
notes: Ground-station telemetry only; it does not replace independent RC control. Confirm local spectrum rules before ordering.

exact_spec: 2.4 GHz ExpressLRS version
notes: Configure a three-position mode switch and an immediate RTL/land override.

exact_spec: 2.4 GHz ExpressLRS diversity receiver
notes: Connect by CRSF to a Pixhawk UART and bench-test RC-loss failsafe.

exact_spec: 2800 mAh flat-top cell for RadioMaster Pocket
notes: Two transmitter cells; inspect wraps and install with correct polarity.

exact_spec: 22.2 V; XT60; one flight pack and one rotation pack
notes: Only one pack is installed per flight. Reweigh the delivered pack; the 950 g installed mass is a planning estimate.

exact_spec: 325 W AC/DC; dual channel; 1S-6S; 15 A
notes: Charge in a fire-resistant location with balance lead connected and pack attended.

exact_spec: 2S-12S; six ESC outputs; current sensing
notes: Source from a reputable seller. Main motor current bypasses Pixhawk power modules.

exact_spec: 3S-14S; configure one at 5.2 V for Pixhawk and one at 5.2 V for Pi
notes: Keep autopilot and companion-computer rails independent; join grounds at the designed power-distribution point.

exact_spec: 32 GB A1 for Pixhawk logs
notes: Confirm onboard logging before every flight-test phase.

exact_spec: 160x120 radiometric LWIR core; up to 400 C; 9 Hz
notes: Use temperature thresholds only after calibration against controlled reference targets; thermal detections require RGB confirmation.

exact_spec: USB UVC interface for FLIR Lepton cores
notes: Connect by USB to the Raspberry Pi and secure both boards in a ventilated protective enclosure.

exact_spec: 1080p UVC USB 2.0; 160-degree lens
notes: Chosen because the owned Raspberry Pi CSI port is reported dead. Lock exposure during dataset collection when practical.

exact_spec: 0.1-12 m; UART/I2C; IP65; 5 g
notes: Downward rangefinder for low-altitude control; sunlight and dark surfaces reduce usable range.

exact_spec: 64 GB A2 for Raspberry Pi OS and field data
notes: Keep flight logs and captured imagery synchronized with UTC timestamps.

exact_spec: Water-only; target 1.0-1.3 L/min and at least 3 bar; under 150 g
notes: Do not purchase until the exact pump is weighed and flow-tested. Never use flammable or corrosive liquids.

exact_spec: COM-15093; I2C-controlled relay; 5.5 A contact rating
notes: Default state must be OFF. Add a flyback diode or suppression appropriate to the selected DC pump and retain a pilot inhibit.

exact_spec: 1 L HDPE tank or flexible bladder; filter; check valve; tubing; mist nozzle
notes: Start with 0.75 L water. Test leaks, center of gravity, pump dry-run behavior and jettison-free retention.

exact_spec: 10/12/14/16 AWG silicone wire; XT60; bullets; fuse; capacitors; heat-shrink; braided sleeve; straps
notes: Size connectors and fuse from measured current. Add strain relief and abrasion protection at every carbon edge.

exact_spec: PETG/ASA camera housing; vibration mounts; GPS mast; pump/tank cradle
notes: No PLA flight parts. Preserve airflow around ESCs and do not seal the barometer without a breathable foam path.

exact_spec: 5 V buzzer plus addressable red/green orientation LEDs
notes: Make arm state visible and ensure buzzer remains audible after an off-field landing.

exact_spec: Thrust stand for 16-inch props; 6S wattmeter; optical tachometer; IR thermometer
notes: Buy one motor/ESC/prop set first and record thrust current RPM and temperature before purchasing the remaining propulsion set.

exact_spec: M3 hardware; locknuts; threadlocker; prop adapters; ESC signal leads; anti-spark plug
notes: Use metal locknuts or manufacturer-approved retention on motors and props; inspect after every test flight.

notes: Requote immediately before purchase. Reserve cannot be used to bypass testing or safety equipment.

notes: Power only from its dedicated regulated 5.2 V rail. Add a clean shutdown procedure.
